_comment: Gemini CLI sandboxes MCP server subprocesses with folder-trust + path-allowlist controls. Even after `--skip-trust` and `--include-directories`, host audio access is unreliable — same trap as Codex (bwrap-class). The env block below routes TTS+STT through host-side aawazz-mouth (:7861) and aawazz-ears (:7862) FastAPI services running outside the sandbox. Drop the env block if Gemini CLI is running without a sandbox.
